name: semionstone-codex-guidelines
description: SemionStone's behavioral guidelines for Codex to reduce wrong assumptions, overengineering, unrelated diffs, and unverifiable code changes.

interface.shortDescription: Coding-agent rules for simpler, safer Codex changes.
interface.longDescription: A reusable Codex skill and project instruction file based on Karpathy-style coding-agent principles: think before coding, keep implementations simple, make surgical changes, and verify against concrete goals.
defaultPrompt: Use Karpathy Codex Guidelines for this coding task.
Review this diff with surgical-change principles.
Turn this bug report into a verifiable fix plan.
